expectations.evidence: Lines 5-14 define Anthropic brand colors with hex values: \definecolor{clay}{HTML}{D97757}, \definecolor{sky}{HTML}{6A9BCC}, \definecolor{cactus}{HTML}{BCD1CA}, \definecolor{slate}{HTML}{141413}, \definecolor{ivory}{HTML}{FAF9F5}, \definecolor{fig}{HTML}{C46686}, \definecolor{olive}{HTML}{788C5D}, \definecolor{oat}{HTML}{E3DACC}, \definecolor{gray500}{HTML}{87867F}

Lines 63-70 define vertical centering offsets: \def\hiddenoffset{0} (reference layer with 6 nodes), \def\inputoffset{1.1} (input layer: (6-4)/2 * nodesep = 1.1), \def\outputoffset{2.2} (output layer: (6-2)/2 * nodesep = 2.2). Offsets applied in node positioning lines 74, 79, 84 using -\i*\nodesep - \{input,hidden,output}offset pattern
